title: sorbus aria var. latifolia
intro: Sorbus aria var. latifolia, commonly known as the whitebeam, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is a variant of the wild service tree (Sorbus aria). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Sorbus aria var. latifolia include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
